start.text: The contracts are good, life is good, God is great.

start_boss.text: God’s grace clothes me in IMMENSE power!
This is a dark place, but the light of God shall guide us.

retreat.text: If God willed it, then so be it.

out_of_missiles.text: Put not your faith in those weapons, Captain, keep your faith in US.

engaged.text: I shall pray for all those I am killing!

need_help.text: There is far too much agony in this garden.
Hail Mary, full of grace, the Lord is with thee...

pursuing.text: God shall see to us all, but I shall see to our enemies first.
May the Lord open their hearts before I do.

running.text: If you're going to run, run to church!
God wills it that I find safety!

hull_50.text: Yes, God, give me the burdens! Give me the weight! I can take it!

hull_30.text: There is Hell in the hull!

death.text: Argh…! I am ready to meet my maker.

victory.text: I do what He asks of me.
To the realm of the dead with you.

victory_boss.text: Through God, nothing can stop us!
